zh.lifeSummary: 當Elgiva de Ulchel於1085年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親M de Ulchel30歲，母親F de Ulchel20歲。她和Sir Roger de East Markham至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1142年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elgiva de Ulchel于1085年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲M de Ulchel30岁，母亲F de Ulchel20岁。她和Sir Roger de East Markham至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1142年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Elgiva de Ulchel was born in 1085, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, M de Ulchel, was 30 and her mother, F de Ulchel, was 20. She had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Roger de East Markham. She died in 1142, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elgiva de Ulchel est née en 1085, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, M de Ulchel, avait 30 ans et sa mère, F de Ulchel, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Roger d’East Markham. Elle est décédée en 1142, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elgiva de Ulchel 1085 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater M de Ulchel 30 und ihre Mutter F de Ulchel 20. Sie hatte mit Sir Roger de East Markham mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1142 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elgiva de Ulchel è nata il nel 1085 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, M de Ulchel, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, F de Ulchel, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Roger de East Markham. Morì nel 1142, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Elgiva de Ulchelが1085年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父M de Ulchelは30歳，母F de Ulchelは20歳であった。彼女はSir Roger de East Markhamとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1142年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elgiva de Ulchel(이)가 1085년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 M de Ulchel(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 F de Ulchel(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Roger de East Markham(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Roger de East Markham. Ela faleceu em 1142, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elgiva de Ulchel родилась в 1085 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени M de Ulchel было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали F de Ulchel, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir Roger de East Markham. Она умерла в 1142 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Sir Roger de East Markham. Murió en 1142, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
